items.title: North Koreans hackers likely behind $286 million Drift Protocol exploit: Elliptic
items.whyYouShouldCare: The involvement of North Korean hackers in the Drift Protocol exploit raises concerns about security vulnerabilities within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Drift says $280M exploit tied to ‘sophisticated’ admin takeover; ZachXBT criticizes Circle over USDC handling
items.whyYouShouldCare: Drift's $280 million exploit highlights risks associated with administrative controls, potentially affecting user confidence and liquidity in Solana-based platforms.

items.title: SoFi bets on Solana, but DEX volumes hit 2024 low of $55.5 billion!
items.whyYouShouldCare: SoFi's investment in Solana contrasts with declining DEX volumes, indicating potential challenges for ecosystem growth and user engagement.
